transcript.text: So when we say social signals, all we really mean is links to your website from social media platforms
like a link to your website from Facebook or
Twitter or LinkedIn basically one of the social users posted a link to your website. That's really all we mean
So they don't rank your website
But they do show that the website is active on social media
So that's an important way to sort of make it look like the website is real and the website owner is actively doing things to promote the website
So this is a very good way to
make links incoming links that you get look more natural because if a website owner is doing what's necessary to get real links
They'll probably also end up getting a variety of social signals
So you could do this by creating a bunch of social media profiles
Logging into them and then commenting on everything or you can just go to a trusted provider like the ice cream truck shop here and
For $50 you don't have to worry about all of that. So generally
Before looking at social social signals, we're just going to order them from a trusted provider
